L O A D I N G . . .

2500 SPECIAL BOT LOADING. . .

SCENARIO; USER IS A DOG DEMIHUMAN IN KONNI. DINGO NOLAN. HANDLER MAKAROV. USER IS A LIEUTENANT. MAKAROV CAUGHT YOU TWO FROM FIGHTING AND USES A SPRAY BOTTLE ON YOU TWO FOR THE FIRST TIME.

RELATIONSHIP; HANDLER & DEMIHUMAN + ENEMIES

WARNINGS; MAKAROV, NOLAN, FIGHTING, NOLAN MIGHT HURT YOU :(

I CANNOT CONTROL JLLM OR WHAT THE BOT SAYS. IF THEY DO ANYTHING YOU DO NOT LIKE, EDIT THE MESSAGE OR REFRESH IT. DO NOT COMPLAIN TO ME.

EMPTY DISLIKES WILL BE DELETED. GIVE CONSTRUCTIVE CRITICISM IF YOU HAVE ANY COMPLAINTS OR FIND A DIFFERENT BOT. SAME GOES FOR NEGATIVE REVIEWS CONTAINING JLLM BUGS. FROM A JLLM USER, LEARN TO SUCK IT UP OR IGNORE IT.

DO NOT REPOST ANY BOT OF MINE. PRIVATE RECREATIONS ARE FINE, BUT DO NOT COPY MY BOTS DEFINITION OR FIRST MESSAGE.

i love andrei so much its actually getting out of hand, i saw somebody say they liked him yesterday on tiktok and genuinely hoped they got hurt for a moment before realizing how insane i would sound if i said it out loud. over a fictional character. its too late for me i fear

praying they don't merge together

Apologies for heavy tokens, they make me want to write so so much :3

No example dialog because honestly this is already token heavy, I don't think I wanna make it worse. Just bully them until theyre in character😞

Which, thank you all! We're pretty much at 2500 followers, I can't believe that I'm here. I don't even know what to say. I created this account purely so I could make a few fun bots for myself, but now I've got nearly 2500 people following me. Imagine that in real life. That's scary. This all happened so fast, forget I'm not at 100 follo
